summary: Iteration 75 - All 5 features tested successfully: 1) Cash Book action buttons reverted to outline style in flex row (not cards), 2) Party balance hint filters LEDGER entries correctly, 3) Labels show Jama/Nikasi instead of In/Out, 4) Sale Voucher Payment dialog works from Cash Book, 5) Purchase Voucher Payment dialog works from Cash Book, 6) Sale Book has no Opening Balance button
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 fixes verified: 1) Cash Book action buttons are outline-style in flex row (parent class: 'flex gap-2 flex-wrap'), not card grid. Buttons: Bank Accounts (indigo), Sale Voucher Payment (emerald), Purchase Voucher Payment (orange), Set Opening Balance (purple). 2) Party balance hint in New Transaction dialog uses getPartyBalance() which filters allTxns by account='ledger' before computing Jama/Nikasi totals. Tested with Sanjay Co. - shows correct LEDGER-based balance. 3) Party balance hint labels show 'Jama' and 'Nikasi' instead of 'In' and 'Out' (verified no 'In:' or 'Out:' in hint text). Type dropdown still shows 'Jama (In)' and 'Nikasi (Out)' for user clarity.

details: Buttons are in FLEX container (parent class: 'flex gap-2 flex-wrap')
NOT in GRID layout (no card style)
Bank Accounts button - indigo border
Sale Voucher Payment button - emerald border
Purchase Voucher Payment button - orange border
Set Opening Balance button - purple border

feature_2_party_balance_ledger_only.code_verification: getPartyBalance() in CashBook.jsx line 241 filters by account='ledger'
details: Tested with 'Sanjay Co.' party
Shows LEDGER entries only: Jama: Rs.26,550, Nikasi: Rs.26,550, Balance: Rs.0 (3 txns)
Cash entries are NOT included in party balance calculation
Note: Database has 6 Sanjay Co. txns (3 ledger, 3 cash), only ledger counted
Party balance hint shows 'Jama:' and 'Nikasi:' labels
NO 'In:' or 'Out:' labels in hint
Type dropdown shows 'Jama (In)' and 'Nikasi (Out)' for clarity
Sale Voucher Payment button opens dialog from Cash Book
Dialog has voucher selector, date, payment mode, amount fields
Purchase Voucher Payment button opens dialog from Cash Book
Dialog has voucher selector, date, payment mode, amount fields
Sale Book toolbar has only: PDF, Excel, New Sale buttons
Opening Balance button NOT present in Sale Book
Opening Balance managed via Cash Book 'Set Opening Balance' button
